data.body: Approved methodology + mods: sidecar enrichment (UX-invisible) approved; Step5 = interactive posture review; Step7 = run new thresholds on 20 high-finding/overlay tickets, discuss any block. Investigated data shape: REVIEW_RESULT slim findings carry validity/impact/priority + 7 verifier binary sub-answers + stable content-hash id + material_fingerprint. Threshold source-of-truth = criteria_routing.json {block_threshold, default_posture}; orchestrator._threshold_for maps posture->blocking_enabled, bt=min over a finding's criteria. Branch ff'd to origin/main.
